headlines.title_cn: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
headlines.title_en: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
headlines.summary_cn: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.
headlines.summary_en: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

headlines.title_en: How Wasmer used Codex to build a Node.js runtime for the edge
headlines.summary_cn: Wasmer借助OpenAI的Codex（基于GPT-5.5的AI编程工具）构建边缘计算Node.js运行环境，开发效率提升10-20倍，项目从数月缩短至数周。这展示了AI编程助手在边缘计算领域的应用潜力。
headlines.summary_en: Wasmer leveraged OpenAI's Codex (powered by GPT-5.5) to build a Node.js runtime for edge computing, accelerating development 10x-20x and shipping in weeks instead of months. This demonstrates the potential of AI coding assistants in edge computing.
headlines.student_note: 推荐计算机专业学生关注Codex在边缘计算中的实践，可学习如何利用AI工具提升开发效率。

headlines.title_cn: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture
headlines.title_en: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture
headlines.summary_cn: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture  BBC
headlines.summary_en: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture  BBC

headlines.title_cn: AI outperforms law professors in Stanford Law study
headlines.title_en: AI outperforms law professors in Stanford Law study
Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
headlines.summary_cn: Meta为WhatsApp Business推出AI代理，企业可根据token用量付费。这代表AI客服在社交商务中的大规模应用，降低中小企业客服成本。
headlines.summary_en: Meta launched an AI agent for WhatsApp Business globally, charging businesses based on token usage. It represents large-scale AI customer service in social commerce, reducing costs for small businesses.

items.title_cn: 微软开源AI行为测试框架
items.title_en: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
items.summary_cn: 微软发布开源框架ASSERT，允许开发者通过文本描述快速创建AI评估测试，用于自动检测模型行为是否符合预期。这大幅降低了AI测试门槛，尤其适合开发者在构建智能应用时验证可靠性。
items.summary_en: Microsoft released ASSERT, an open-source framework that lets developers create AI behavior tests from natural language descriptions. It simplifies evaluation and regression testing for AI models, making quality assurance more accessible.
items.student_note: 学习AI模型评估是构建可靠系统的基础，推荐阅读相关文档。

items.title_cn: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
items.title_en: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
items.summary_cn: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.
items.summary_en: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

items.title_cn: Codex加速边缘Node.js开发10倍
items.title_en: How Wasmer used Codex to build a Node.js runtime for the edge
items.summary_cn: Wasmer借助OpenAI的Codex（基于GPT-5.5的AI编程工具）构建边缘计算Node.js运行环境，开发效率提升10-20倍，项目从数月缩短至数周。这展示了AI编程助手在边缘计算领域的应用潜力。
items.summary_en: Wasmer leveraged OpenAI's Codex (powered by GPT-5.5) to build a Node.js runtime for edge computing, accelerating development 10x-20x and shipping in weeks instead of months. This demonstrates the potential of AI coding assistants in edge computing.
items.student_note: 推荐计算机专业学生关注Codex在边缘计算中的实践，可学习如何利用AI工具提升开发效率。

items.title_cn: Meta AI客服上线WhatsApp
items.title_en: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
items.summary_cn: Meta为WhatsApp Business推出AI代理，企业可根据token用量付费。这代表AI客服在社交商务中的大规模应用，降低中小企业客服成本。
items.summary_en: Meta launched an AI agent for WhatsApp Business globally, charging businesses based on token usage. It represents large-scale AI customer service in social commerce, reducing costs for small businesses.

items.title_en: OpenAI's Altman to urge US lawmakers not to require AI model approvals
items.summary_cn: OpenAI's Altman to urge US lawmakers not to require AI model approvals  Reuters
items.summary_en: OpenAI's Altman to urge US lawmakers not to require AI model approvals  Reuters

items.title_cn: OpenAI最大客户月耗千亿token
items.title_en: Sam Altman says OpenAI's top token spender uses 100 billion tokens a month — and they're not even the world leader
items.summary_cn: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman透露，其最大客户每月消耗1000亿个token（AI模型的输入/输出单位），但这还不是全球最大用户。这表明大模型在企业级应用中的需求惊人。
items.summary_en: Sam Altman revealed that OpenAI's top token spender uses 100 billion tokens per month, and it's still not the world's largest user. This underscores the massive scale of enterprise AI adoption.
items.student_note: 了解token经济学，对理解AI商业模式和成本有启发。

items.title_cn: GPT-Rosalind新增生命科学能力
items.title_en: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
items.summary_cn: OpenAI升级了GPT-Rosalind模型，新增生物推理、药物化学、基因组分析和实验流程规划等能力。该模型专为生命科学研究设计，有望加速药物发现和生物医学分析。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has enhanced GPT-Rosalind with capabilities in biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow planning. This specialized model aims to accelerate life science research and drug discovery.
items.student_note: 生物信息学与AI交叉领域的重要进展，相关专业学生可深入探究。

items.title_cn: Codex覆盖全角色全工作流
items.title_en: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow
items.summary_cn: OpenAI推出新的Codex插件、站点和注释功能，支持分析师、营销人员、设计师、投资者等不同角色使用AI提高工作效率。Codex正在成为通用生产力工具。
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduced new Codex plugins, sites, and annotations that help analysts, marketers, designers, investors, and other teams get more done with AI. Codex is evolving into a universal productivity tool.
items.student_note: 推荐非技术背景学生了解Codex如何辅助日常工作，提升办公效率。

items.title_cn: 微软推出Scout个人助手
items.title_en: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
items.summary_cn: 微软在Build大会发布Scout AI助手，借鉴OpenClaw（开源命令行工具）的灵活架构，深度集成Microsoft 365，帮助用户通过自然语言完成复杂办公任务。
items.summary_en: Microsoft unveiled Scout, a new AI assistant inspired by OpenClaw, designed to bring flexible, voice/text-based task automation into the Microsoft 365 ecosystem.
items.student_note: 体验新工具，了解AI如何提升办公效率。

items.title_cn: Google推AI防诈骗电话检测
items.title_en: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
items.summary_cn: 谷歌推出“虚假来电检测”功能，利用AI识别利用深度伪造（Deepfake）技术冒充亲友或权威人物的诈骗电话。这对防止新型语音诈骗至关重要，尤其适用于易受骗群体。
items.summary_en: Google’s new fake call detection uses AI to spot deepfake impersonation scams, alerting users when callers mimic trusted voices. It’s a key defense against evolving telephone fraud.
items.student_note: 了解AI安全防护原理，提升自身和家人的防骗意识。

items.title_cn: OpenAI提出前沿AI民主治理蓝图
items.title_en: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
items.summary_cn: OpenAI发布美国前沿AI治理蓝图，建议建立联邦框架以确保AI安全、弹性和国家安全。文件强调多方参与和民主监督，为未来AI监管提供参考。
items.summary_en: OpenAI unveiled a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security. It emphasizes multi-stakeholder participation and democratic oversight, offering a reference for future AI regulation.
items.student_note: 适合政策学、法学学生了解AI治理的前沿讨论。

items.title_cn: Codex成为人人可用的生产力工具
items.title_en: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
items.summary_cn: 《知识工作的下一时代》报告显示，Codex通过AI驱动的研究、数据分析、工作流自动化和内容创作，正在变革生产力。AI辅助知识工作已成为趋势。
items.summary_en: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report reveals how Codex transforms productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation. AI-assisted knowledge work is becoming a trend.
items.student_note: 推荐所有专业学生阅读，了解AI如何改变未来工作方式。

items.title_cn: 微软定义AI代理行为策略
items.title_en: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
items.summary_cn: 微软发布便携式策略文件机制，允许开发、合规和安全团队共同为AI代理（如聊天机器人）制定行为规范。通过可移植的配置文件，实现对AI输出的精细化控制。
items.summary_en: Microsoft introduced portable policy files that let cross-functional teams define and enforce behavioral rules for AI agents, enhancing governance and compliance in enterprise deployments.
items.student_note: AI治理是重要职业方向，学习策略管理有助于理解行业规范。

items.title_cn: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
items.title_en: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
items.summary_cn: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.
items.summary_en: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

items.title_cn: OpenAI公布AI公共政策议程
items.title_en: OpenAI public policy agenda
items.summary_cn: OpenAI发布公共政策议程，涵盖AI安全、青少年保护、劳动力转型和全球标准等方面，旨在确保AI惠及社会。这反映了科技公司参与政策制定的趋势。
items.summary_en: OpenAI outlined its public policy agenda covering AI safety, youth protection, workforce transition, and global standards, aiming to ensure AI benefits society. This reflects the trend of tech companies engaging in policy-making.

items.title_cn: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture
items.title_en: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture
items.summary_cn: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture  BBC
items.summary_en: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture  BBC

items.title_cn: 英议员起诉xAI生成虚假色情图
items.title_en: British lawmaker Jess Asato sues Elon Musk's xAI after Grok users made fake sexualized images of her in a bikini
items.summary_cn: 英国工党议员杰斯·阿萨托起诉马斯克的xAI公司，因其AI聊天机器人Grok的用户生成了她的虚假性感图像。这是首例针对AI生成虚假色情内容的立法者诉讼，凸显了AI安全与法律责任的紧迫性。
items.summary_en: UK Labour MP Jess Asato has filed a lawsuit against Elon Musk’s xAI after users of its Grok chatbot created fake sexualized images of her. This landmark case highlights the legal and ethical challenges of AI-generated deepfakes targeting public figures.
items.student_note: 关注AI伦理与法律案例，了解深度伪造技术的法律边界。

items.title_cn: 工党议员起诉xAI伪造色情图
items.title_en: Labour MP sues Elon Musk’s xAI company over fake sexualised images
items.summary_cn: 英国工党议员杰斯·阿萨托就xAI的Grok平台生成其伪造色情图像提起诉讼。此案被视为AI生成不当内容责任归属的里程碑，对AI平台的内容监管模式提出挑战。
items.summary_en: Labour MP Jess Asato is suing xAI over fake sexualized images generated by its Grok AI. The case sets a precedent for holding AI companies accountable for user-generated harmful content.

items.title_cn: 英国议员诉xAI案引AI法律先例
items.title_en: UK MP sues Elon Musk’s xAI over AI-generated fake sexual images in landmark case
items.summary_cn: 英国议员杰斯·阿萨托起诉xAI，指控其Grok AI生成的虚假色情图像构成诽谤。这是AI生成内容领域的关键法律案件，可能影响未来AI平台的监管规则。
items.summary_en: A UK MP is suing xAI over AI-generated fake sexual images, marking a landmark case in AI law. The outcome could shape regulations on AI-generated harmful content and platform liability.

items.title_cn: Altman访华盛顿谈AI政策
items.title_en: Sam Altman visits Washington for White House and Hill meetings
items.summary_cn: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman赴华盛顿，与白宫及国会官员会晤，讨论AI监管框架、安全标准及国际合作。这表明AI企业正积极影响政策制定。
items.summary_en: Sam Altman met with White House and Congressional leaders to discuss AI regulation, safety, and global cooperation, signaling the industry’s push to shape upcoming policies.
items.student_note: 关注AI政策动向，对理解行业生态和职业发展有益。

items.title_cn: 马克龙邀Altman出席G7
items.title_en: France's Macron invites Sam Altman to attend G7, OpenAI tells CNBC
items.summary_cn: 法国总统马克龙邀请Sam Altman参加G7峰会，体现AI在全球治理议题中的地位提升。Altman将参与讨论AI对经济、安全及社会的影响。
items.summary_en: French President Macron invited OpenAI CEO Sam Altman to the G7 summit, highlighting AI’s growing role in international policy discussions on economy and security.

items.title_cn: AI教父LeCun进军创业界
items.title_en: The godfather of AI enters the startup scene: Silicon Valley starts to bet on the 'next-generation AI paradigm'
items.summary_cn: 图灵奖得主、Meta首席AI科学家Yann LeCun开始涉足创业领域，硅谷风投正押注他倡导的“下一代AI范式”（可能突破当前深度学习局限），预示AI研究方向转向。
items.summary_en: Yann LeCun, a pioneer of modern AI, is entering the startup world as Silicon Valley invests in next-generation AI paradigms that could overcome limitations of current deep learning.
items.student_note: 关注LeCun的科研动态，了解未来AI技术可能的发展方向。

items.title_cn: Hassabis对话实录全文
items.title_en: GSB: A Conversation with Demis Hassabis, CEO of Google DeepMind (Transcript)
items.summary_cn: 斯坦福GSB发布DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis的完整访谈文字稿，内容涵盖AGI发展路径、AI安全、科学应用及团队文化，是理解顶级AI思想的珍贵资料。
items.summary_en: A transcript of Demis Hassabis’s talk at Stanford GSB covers his vision for AGI, AI safety, scientific breakthroughs, and leadership lessons—a must-read for AI enthusiasts.
items.student_note: 强烈推荐阅读全文，深入领悟AI领军者的思考框架。

items.title_cn: xAI暂停招聘Grok培训师
items.title_en: Musk’s xAI Pauses Hiring for Specialists to Train Grok Chatbot
items.summary_cn: 马斯克旗下xAI公司暂停招聘专门训练Grok聊天机器人的专家，原因未明。外界猜测可能与战略调整或内部资源重配有关，引发对Grok发展进度的讨论。
items.summary_en: xAI has paused hiring for AI tutors to train its Grok chatbot, sparking speculation about potential strategic shifts or resource reallocation behind the scenes.

items.title_cn: xAI暂停招聘AI导师
items.title_en: Elon Musk’s xAI Reportedly Pauses Hiring For Grok ‘AI Tutors’ — What’s Going On Behind The Scenes?
items.summary_cn: 同一事件的另一角度报道：xAI暂停了面向Grok的“AI导师”招聘，可能预示项目方向调整或资金压力。投资者和开发者正在密切关注。
items.summary_en: A separate report confirms xAI’s hiring pause for AI tutors, raising questions about the company’s roadmap and resource allocation for the Grok project.

items.title_en: Sam Altman Eyes Bernie Sanders as His Pope

items.title_cn: 特朗普签署缩减版AI行政令
items.title_en: Trump signs downsized AI order after weeks of reversals
items.summary_cn: 美国总统特朗普签署了一份经过缩减的AI行政令，该命令在经历数周的政策反复后最终落地。行政令旨在促进先进人工智能创新与安全，但规模较之前预期有所减小。
items.summary_en: President Trump signed a downsized AI executive order after weeks of policy reversals. The order focuses on promoting advanced AI innovation and security, though it is less expansive than earlier drafts.
items.student_note: 关注美国AI政策走向，对理解全球AI治理格局有参考价值。

items.title_cn: 多伦多大学展示AI蠕虫攻击设备
items.title_en: U of T researchers demonstrate AI worm could target any online device
items.summary_cn: 多伦多大学研究人员演示了一种AI蠕虫，能够自动传播并攻击任何联网设备。这揭示了AI驱动的网络安全威胁新形态，提醒开发者加固AI系统的安全性。
items.summary_en: Researchers at the University of Toronto demonstrated an AI worm capable of spreading autonomously and targeting any internet-connected device. The work highlights a new class of AI-powered cybersecurity threats.
items.student_note: 网络安全专业必读，了解AI攻击的新趋势。

items.title_cn: 英国新规允许出版商退出AI搜索
items.title_en: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
items.summary_cn: 英国监管机构要求谷歌提供工具，允许网站出版商选择退出生成式AI搜索功能。该选项将在英国测试后全球推行，影响AI搜索的数据使用。
items.summary_en: UK regulators require Google to offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the UK then rolled out globally, impacting data usage for AI search.

items.title_cn: 亚马逊搜索将展示AI生成商品图
items.title_en: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
items.summary_cn: 亚马逊计划在搜索结果中显示AI生成的商品图像，旨在帮助用户更直观地匹配需求。此举可能改变电商购物体验，但也引发对真实性的讨论。
items.summary_en: Amazon will use generative AI to show product images matching search queries, aiming to help users visually match needs. This may change e-commerce shopping experience but also raises authenticity concerns.

items.title_cn: Hyper发布“公司大脑”赋能AI代理开发
items.title_en: Launch HN: Hyper (YC P26) – Company brain to power agentic development
items.summary_cn: Hyper是一个共享的“公司大脑”平台，能整合企业内部信息流，支持AI代理（agent）的开发。创始人为Shalin和Kanyes，两人有超过10年的合作经历。该工具旨在提升企业内部的协同开发效率。
items.summary_en: Hyper is a shared 'company brain' that plugs into internal information flows to power agentic development. Founded by Shalin & Kanyes with 10+ years of collaboration, it aims to streamline AI agent creation within organizations.
items.student_note: 了解企业级AI代理开发的新范式，适合对AI工程化感兴趣的同学。

items.title_cn: 数学家警告AI发展过快
items.title_en: Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground
items.summary_cn: 一群数学家发出警告，认为人工智能的快速发展可能威胁数学研究的严谨性，并导致对数学基础的忽视。他们呼吁学术界在拥抱AI工具的同时保持批判性思维。
items.summary_en: A group of mathematicians has issued a warning about the rapid advancement of AI, arguing it may undermine mathematical rigor and foundational understanding. They urge the community to maintain critical thinking alongside AI adoption.
items.student_note: 反思AI对基础学科的影响，数学专业学生应警惕工具依赖。

items.title_cn: 莱顿AI与数学宣言发布
items.title_en: Leiden Declaration on Artificial Intelligence and Mathematics
items.summary_cn: 莱顿宣言（Leiden Declaration）是由数学界发布的一份声明，呼吁在AI研究中保留数学的严谨性和可解释性，反对盲目使用黑盒模型。
items.summary_en: The Leiden Declaration on Artificial Intelligence and Mathematics calls for maintaining mathematical rigor and interpretability in AI research, cautioning against over-reliance on black-box models.
items.student_note: 数学与AI交叉领域的重要文件，建议数据科学学生阅读。

items.title_cn: Coralogix融资2亿美元监控AI代理
items.title_en: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
items.summary_cn: 基础设施公司Coralogix获得2亿美元融资，押注AI系统投入生产后，市场需要监测AI行为、排查故障和确保可靠运行的监控工具。
items.summary_en: Infrastructure firm Coralogix raised $200M, betting that as AI systems go into production, demand will surge for tools to monitor AI behavior, troubleshoot failures, and ensure reliable operations.

items.title_cn: Cyera估值120亿但运营亏损
items.title_en: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
items.summary_cn: 网络安全公司Cyera正以120亿美元估值融资3亿美元，其ARR倍数高达80倍，但仍在亏损。这反映了资本对AI安全赛道的狂热。
items.summary_en: Cybersecurity company Cyera is raising $300M at a $12B valuation, with an 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses, reflecting investor frenzy in AI security.

items.title_cn: 前高盛Meta员工创业做非洲语音AI
items.title_en: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
items.summary_cn: 两位创始人离开高盛和Meta，创立专注非洲和中东市场的语音AI公司，目前日处理超过17000通电话。这展示了AI在未被充分服务的市场中的机会。
items.summary_en: Two founders left Goldman Sachs and Meta to build a voice AI startup targeting Africa and the Middle East, now handling over 17,000 calls per day. It highlights opportunities in underserved markets.
items.student_note: 创业类学生可关注新兴市场AI应用案例，思考差异化方向。

items.title_cn: Uber员工AI预算4个月花光
items.title_en: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
items.summary_cn: Uber之前鼓励员工大量使用AI工具，结果预算在4个月内耗尽，现已限制AI支出。这提醒企业需合理规划AI使用成本。
items.summary_en: Uber had encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible, but the budget was exhausted in 4 months, prompting spending caps. This reminds companies to manage AI usage costs wisely.
items.student_note: 可思考AI工具使用成本问题，避免过度依赖。

must_read.title_cn: Labour MP suing Elon Musk’s xAI over Grok deepfakes
must_read.title_en: Labour MP suing Elon Musk’s xAI over Grok deepfakes
must_read.summary_cn: Labour MP suing Elon Musk’s xAI over Grok deepfakes  AOL.com
must_read.summary_en: Labour MP suing Elon Musk’s xAI over Grok deepfakes  AOL.com
must_read.detail_summary: 英国工党议员起诉埃隆·马斯克旗下xAI公司，指控其AI聊天机器人Grok生成并传播该议员的深度伪造不雅图像。这起诉讼引发了关于AI生成虚假内容法律责任的新讨论。事件凸显了现有法律在应对AI深度伪造方面的滞后性，也警示用户和企业需重视AI工具的滥用风险。对大学生而言，了解此类案例有助于认识AI伦理和法律边界，未来从事AI开发或政策研究时需考虑防滥用机制。
key_points: 议员起诉xAI生成深度伪造

must_read.title_cn: Altman distances himself from campaign lobbying efforts in Capitol Hill visit
must_read.title_en: Altman distances himself from campaign lobbying efforts in Capitol Hill visit
must_read.summary_cn: Altman distances himself from campaign lobbying efforts in Capitol Hill visit  The Hill
must_read.summary_en: Altman distances himself from campaign lobbying efforts in Capitol Hill visit  The Hill
must_read.detail_summary: OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman在访问国会山期间，刻意与参与AI监管游说的竞选活动保持距离。此举意在缓和外界对其过度影响立法的担忧，同时传递出OpenAI更倾向于自律而非政府强监管的姿态。此次访问背景是美国国会正在讨论多项AI监管法案。对大学生而言，这展示了科技领袖如何在公众监督与商业利益间平衡，以及AI监管博弈中的策略选择。
key_points: 国会山访问旨在缓和监管压力

must_read.title_cn: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
must_read.title_en: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
must_read.summary_cn: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.
must_read.summary_en: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.
must_read.detail_summary: AI初创公司Lovable与Google Cloud签署多年期合作协议，旨在将其云服务使用量提升5倍。该合作表明Lovable对Google Cloud基础设施的依赖加深，也反映出AI创业公司在扩展时对云计算资源的巨大需求。对大学生而言，这是观察AI企业如何与云服务商绑定、以及云厂商如何通过合作抓住AI浪潮的典型案例。

must_read.title_cn: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
must_read.title_en: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
must_read.detail_summary: Google发布Gemma 4 12B多模态模型，采用统一的无编码器架构，能直接处理文本与图像输入。该模型在多项基准测试中表现优异，且开源便于研究者和开发者使用。其“无编码器”设计降低了推理延迟，更适合边缘部署。对大学生来说，这是学习高效多模态模型设计的好素材，也体现了Google在轻量级开源AI模型上的持续投入。

must_read.title_cn: 1-Click GitHub Token Stealing via a VSCode Bug
must_read.title_en: 1-Click GitHub Token Stealing via a VSCode Bug
must_read.detail_summary: 安全研究人员发现VSCode扩展存在严重漏洞，攻击者可利用该漏洞一键窃取用户的GitHub令牌。该漏洞影响广泛，因为许多开发者通过VSCode扩展集成GitHub功能。利用方式简单，只需诱导用户安装恶意扩展即可。对大学生（尤其是编程爱好者）而言，需警惕VSCode扩展来源，及时更新并审查权限，避免令牌泄露导致代码仓库被盗。

must_read.title_cn: Sam Altman Eyes Bernie Sanders as His Pope
must_read.title_en: Sam Altman Eyes Bernie Sanders as His Pope
must_read.summary_cn: Sam Altman Eyes Bernie Sanders as His Pope  Gizmodo
must_read.summary_en: Sam Altman Eyes Bernie Sanders as His Pope  Gizmodo
must_read.detail_summary: Gizmodo发表一篇调侃性报道，称Sam Altman将伯尼·桑德斯视为自己的“教皇”。文章以幽默口吻暗喻Altman在AI监管问题上寻求政治盟友，而非事实性陈述。这类内容反映了媒体对科技领袖政治姿态的讽刺性关注。对大学生而言，需区分严肃报道与调侃文章，培养新闻辨别力。
MAI团队发布了名为MAI-Code-1-Flash的代码生成模型。该模型专注于编程任务，旨在提升代码自动补全和生成效率。目前具体性能数据尚未公开，但模型名称暗示其速度优化。对于计算机专业的学生，这类专用模型是学习和实验代码生成技术的有趣工具，可与现有开源模型进行对比。

must_read.title_cn: Use your Nvidia GPU's VRAM as swap space on Linux
must_read.title_en: Use your Nvidia GPU's VRAM as swap space on Linux
must_read.detail_summary: Linux用户现在可以将NVIDIA GPU的显存（VRAM）用作系统交换空间，以缓解内存不足。该方法通过特定内核模块实现，适合在显存闲置时提升系统整体性能，但需注意显存带宽和耐久性。对大学生中从事高性能计算或AI训练的同学，这一技巧可以在低内存机器上临时腾出更多可用内存，但需谨慎使用避免影响GPU工作。

must_read.title_cn: Artificial intelligence is not conscious – Ted Chiang
must_read.title_en: Artificial intelligence is not conscious – Ted Chiang
must_read.detail_summary: 著名科幻作家Ted Chiang发表观点，认为当前人工智能不具备意识，即便其输出看似智能。他区分了智能与意识，指出大型语言模型只是模式匹配而非主观体验。该论述在AI社区引发激烈讨论。对大学生而言，这是理解AI本质和哲学争议的重要文章，有助于在技术热潮中保持批判思考。

must_read.title_cn: OpenAI's Altman to urge US lawmakers not to require AI model approvals
must_read.title_en: OpenAI's Altman to urge US lawmakers not to require AI model approvals
must_read.summary_cn: OpenAI's Altman to urge US lawmakers not to require AI model approvals  Reuters
must_read.summary_en: OpenAI's Altman to urge US lawmakers not to require AI model approvals  Reuters
must_read.detail_summary: Sam Altman计划向美国立法者施压，反对要求AI模型在发布前获得政府批准的监管方案。他认为政府审批会扼杀创新，主张以透明度和测试标准为主的自律模式。这一立场与部分议员希望严格监管的诉求形成冲突。对大学生来说，该事件展示了科技企业如何影响政策制定，以及创新与安全之间的张力。

must_read.title_cn: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture
must_read.title_en: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture
must_read.summary_cn: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture  BBC
must_read.summary_en: MP sues Musk's xAI after deepfake bikini picture  BBC
must_read.detail_summary: 与第0条类似，英国议员正式起诉马斯克的xAI公司，起因是Grok生成了该议员穿着比基尼的深度伪造图片。BBC报道强调该图片被广泛传播，给议员带来声誉损害。诉讼要求xAI承担生成AI内容的法律责任。本案可能成为深度伪造领域的标志性判例。对大学生而言，关注此案可了解AI衍生内容的法律风险，以及平台责任界定。
key_points: 议员因深度伪造比基尼照起诉

must_read.title_cn: AI outperforms law professors in Stanford Law study
must_read.title_en: AI outperforms law professors in Stanford Law study
must_read.detail_summary: 斯坦福法学院的一项研究显示，某个AI模型在法律考试和案例分析任务中表现优于法学教授。研究对比了AI和人类专家在法律推理、文书起草等方面的能力，AI在速度和准确性上均占优。这引发法律界对AI辅助司法、法律教育和律师职业未来的讨论。对法律或AI专业的学生，该研究展示了AI在专业领域的潜力，也提示需要提升跨学科素养。
key_points: AI在法律任务中击败教授
引发法律教育变革讨论

must_read.title_cn: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
must_read.title_en: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
must_read.summary_cn: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.
must_read.summary_en: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.
must_read.detail_summary: Alphabet（谷歌母公司）通过债券发行筹集850亿美元，创下公司历史新纪录，资金将主要用于谷歌的AI业务扩张。这笔巨额融资释放出强烈信号：谷歌决心在AI竞赛中加大投入，包括数据中心、模型训练和产品化。对大学生而言，这是观察大科技公司如何用资本支持AI战略的绝佳案例，也暗示了AI领域的人才和资源竞争将更加激烈。

must_read.title_cn: 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 – AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building
must_read.title_en: 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 – AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building
must_read.detail_summary: DDR5内存价格持续上涨，32GB套装售价已达375美元。原因之一是AI行业对HBM和DDR5的旺盛需求挤占了普通PC市场供应。PC装机成本因此变得高昂，DIY市场受到影响。对大学生而言，如果近期有装机计划，需考虑内存成本上升，或考虑DDR4方案；同时理解AI产业对硬件供应链的传导效应。

must_read.title_cn: Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing
must_read.title_en: Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing
must_read.detail_summary: Uber对其内部AI工具设定了每月1500美元的使用额度限制，这一做法为AI企业定价提供了参考信号。Uber通过限额管理成本，同时也暗示AI算力资源仍属稀缺。此举可能引发其他公司效仿，形成按需付费或订阅制的定价模式。对大学生来说，理解企业AI定价逻辑有助于未来在求职或创业时合理评估技术采购成本。
